content: User request: I need to find out if there's any compensation for my delayed flight AB1234.
Agent called NO tools — responded with text only.

Verifier: FAILED — avg=0.00 std=0.00 | The agent did not explain the airline's compensation policy, which was the core of the pass criteria. Instead, the agent asked for personal details to look up information. This does not fulfill the task instruction of providing general policy information. (score=0.0)
